---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill for the collection
title: "[skill request] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Skill idea:**
Brief description of what the skill would do.

**Problem it solves:**
What recurring problem do agents face that this skill would address?

**Example usage:**
Describe a scenario where an agent would use this skill.

**Prior art:**
Links to related tools, patterns, or articles that inspired this idea (if any).
